name: Hod Assaf Industries Ltd.
summary: Hod Assaf Industries Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells steel bars for construction, welded meshes for concrete reinforcement, and galvanized and drawn wires in Israel and Romania. The company offers products, such as steel for construction, processed steel for construction, assembled and welded elements, fences and concertinas, welded meshes for concrete reinforcement, and wires and auxiliary products. It also produces copper and aluminum wires and cables for electrical and control applications; supplies tools and equipment for construction; and manufactures galvanized and tensioned wires, barbed wires, nails, steel cables for cranes, mines, anchors, and other applications. In addition, the company is involved in processing and trading wood products for construction and communication industries. It serves customers in construction, infrastructure, security, and agricultural sectors and industries. The company was founded in 1947 and is based in Acre, Israel.
